metadata.summary: RCSB Python Validation Data Utility Classes

documentation:
# RCSB Python PDB Validation Data Utilities

 [![Build Status](https://dev.azure.com/rcsb/RCSB%20PDB%20Python%20Projects/_apis/build/status/rcsb.py-rcsb_utils_validation?branchName=master)](https://dev.azure.com/rcsb/RCSB%20PDB%20Python%20Projects/_build/latest?definitionId=4&branchName=master)

## Introduction

Python utility classes for calculating and accessing PDB validation data.

### Installation

Download the library source software from the project repository:

```bash

git clone --recurse-submodules https://github.com/rcsb/py-rcsb_utils_validation.git

```

Optionally, run test suite (Python versions 2.7, and 3.7) using
[setuptools](https://setuptools.readthedocs.io/en/latest/) or
[tox](http://tox.readthedocs.io/en/latest/example/platform.html):

```bash
python setup.py test

or simply run

tox
```

Installation is via the program [pip](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/pip).

```bash
pip install rcsb.utils.validation

or for the local repository:

pip install .
```

documentation:
Resource adapter for validation reports providing reader and translator tools.

Args:
    urlTarget (str): URL for schema mapping file
    dirPath (str): path to the directory containing cache files
    useCache (bool, optional): flag to use cached files. Defaults to True.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportAdapter.ValidationReportAdapter.__reload
documentation:
Reload local cache of mapping resources to support validation report reader and translator.

Args:

    dirPath (str): path to the directory containing cache files
    useCache (bool, optional): flag to use cached files. Defaults to True.

Returns:
    (object): instance of ValidationReportReader()

documentation:
Return a ValidationReportReader object.

Returns:
    [object] -- returns ValidationReportReader() object

modules.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader
documentation:
Various utilities for extracting data wwPDB validation report data
and transforming these data into mmCIF objects/files.
File:    ValidationReportReader.py
Author:  J. Westbrook
Date:    24-Jan-2019
Version: 0.001
Update:
12-Jun-2023 aae Handle unknown attributes and element names when converting XML

classes.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.toCif
documentation:
Read input XML validation report data file and return data
transformed mmCIF container objects.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__buildCif
documentation:
Construct a mmCIF data category objects for the input
    extracted data.

Args:
    rD (dict): extracted data organized by category.
    containerName (str) : data block name

Returns:
    containers (list):  data container list

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__extract
documentation:
Extract data from the input document and return a dictionary
    of categories containing rows of dictionaries with attribute naming.

Args:
    xrt: ElementTree root element

Returns:
    Extracted data (dict): dictionary organized by category with
                           XML native data names.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__extractExtra
documentation:
Separately extract and parse data from the input document related to EM graphs.
Args:
    xrt: ElementTree root element

Returns:
    (list): DataCategory objects

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__getCommonGraphAttributes
documentation:
Get common EM 2D graph attributes from the input element.

Args:
    el (obj): ElementTree element (2D graph element)

Returns:
    (dict): {'title': , 'x_axis_title': , 'x_axis_scale':, 'x_axis_units':, ... for y-axis}

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__getGraphDataElements
documentation:
Extract graph data elements and append these to input data list.

Args:
    pEl ([type]): [description]
    graphDataId ([type]): [description]

Returns:
    (list): updated input graphDataL

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportReader.ValidationReportReader.__traverse
documentation:
Internal routine to traverse the dom covering/logging all elements and attributes.

Args:
    xrt (object): ElementTree root element
    ns (str): XML namespace

Various utilities for extracting data from wwPDB validation report data
and transforming these data into mmCIF objects/files.

modules.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils
documentation:
Various utilities for extracting metadata from  wwPDB validation report schema
and converting these details to a mmCIF extension dictionary.
File:    ValidationReportSchemaUtils.py
Author:  J. Westbrook
Date:    3-Feb-2019
Version: 0.001
Updates:
30-Mar-2022  dwp remove deprecated xml.etree.cElementTree module

classes.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.buildDictionary
documentation:
Create dictionary definitions from the input content dictionary.

Args:
    cD (dict): input consolidated schema dictionary

Returns:
    containerList (obj list) container list containing definition content

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.getDictionaryMap
documentation:
Create a utility mapping dictionary for between XML elements/attributes and
    PDBx/mmCIF category and attribute names

Args:
    cD (dict): input consolidated schema dictionary

Returns:
    (dict): category and attribute name mappings

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__filterDescription
documentation:
Perform word replacement on the input text description.

Args:
    txt: description text
    mapD: word map

Returns:
    filtered txt string

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__dictionaryPragma
documentation:
Add CIF dictionary header details including name, version and history.

;        Returns:
            Data container (object)  data container with dictionary history and version details

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__buildDefinitions
documentation:
Construct an extension dictionary from input consolidate
            metadata extracted from the XML schema, and from the
            input schema name mapping dictionary.

        Args:
            cD (dict): consolidated xml schema data
            dictionaryMap (dict): mapping details for categories and attributes

        Returns:
#

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__buildAttributeDefinition
documentation:
Construct an attribute definition from input attribute dictionary
    containing metadata extracted from the XML schema, and from the
    input schema name mapping dictionary.
Args:
    atD (dict): attribute metadata dictionary
    dictionaryMap (dict): mapping details for categories and attributes

Returns:
        Attribute definition (object)

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__buildCategoryDefinition
documentation:
Construct an attribute definition from input attribute dictionary
    containing metadata extracted from the XML schema, and from the
    input schema name mapping dictionary.

Args:
    name (str): category name
    description (str): category description
    keyAttributeNames (list): key attribute names
    examples (list): category examples
    contexts (list): category contexts

Returns:
    Definition container (object):

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__exportdictionaryMapping
documentation:
Export a schema mapping file from input consolidated schema metadata.

Args:
    cD: consolidated schema data

Returns:
    typeMap {'categories': {}, 'attributes': {}}

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.readSchema
documentation:
Extract the data organization and type details from the  XSD schema file
describing the wwPDB validation data file.

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__consolidateSchema
documentation:
Args:
    schD (schema):  extracted element and attribute details
    atD (dict): attribute type details
    stD (dict): named simple type details

Returns:
    consolidated schema (dict):

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__getSchema
documentation:
Traverse the schema tree from root and construct the schema hierarchy -
Top-level named elements are mapped to category definitions

methods.name: rcsb.utils.validation.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.ValidationReportSchemaUtils.__parse
documentation: Parse the input XML data file and return ElementTree object.

Args:

Returns:

documentation:
Traverse the schema covering/logging all elements and attributes.

Args:
